rules.name: BP_Filter_OriginalShipment
rules.description: When changing business partner, filter the originalShipment selector to show only completed Customer Shipments (M_InOut where IsSOTrx='Y', DocStatus='CO') from that customer

rules.name: Shipment_AutoFill_Warehouse
rules.description: When selecting the original shipment, auto-fill warehouse from the shipment header

rules.name: ShipmentLine_AutoFill_Product
rules.description: When selecting an original shipment line, auto-fill product, UOM, tax, and default the return quantity to the shipment line quantity

rules.name: Line_Calc_Amount
rules.description: Recalculate line amount when quantity changes (quantity * original unit price from shipment line)

rules.name: Line_Recalc_Header_Total
rules.description: After saving a line, recalculate header total amount (Amt) as sum of all line amounts

rules.name: Qty_Validate_NotExceedShipment
rules.description: Validate that return quantity does not exceed the original shipment line quantity minus previously returned quantities

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields when RMA status is Completed or Voided

rules.name: DocAction_Process
rules.description: Process/Complete the customer RMA document. On completion, generates return receipt (M_InOut with MovementType='C-') and optionally a customer credit memo
